name: Roast Pork (Char Shu)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water and add sugar and salt. Stir until melted.
2. Remove from heat. Add dark soy sauce and rice wine.
3. Mix in minced garlic and ginger. Adjust the seasoning if needed.
4. Place meat in a bowl and pour the mixture over it. Make sure the meat is completely covered.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, or up to 48 hours for better results.
6. Remove from refrigerator and let sit for 10 minutes before baking.
7. Heat oven to 450°F (230°C).
8. Bake pork for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce temperature to 250°F (120°C) and continue baking for another 30 minutes, turning the meat once.
10. Serve hot with your favorite sides.
